title: coleus minutiflorus
intro: Coleus minutiflorus, also known as the small-flowered coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus minutiflorus include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and infusing the leaves, and it is often used in teas and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
